justification: The diff successfully migrates from Java 8 to Java 21, updating compiler settings, dependencies (Jakarta EE, Hibernate 6, JUnit 5), and source code (String.formatted, List.getFirst). However, it introduces spurious churn by adding unrelated dependencies (spring-boot-starter-validation, hamcrest-junit) and modifying XML indentation in persistence.xml, which detracts from coherence.
